title: The Invitation.
content:
The King's most humble servant I,
            Can scarcely spare a minute;
        But I am yours at dinner-time,
            Or else the devil's in it.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "The Invitation.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
